name: Chocolate Chip Crunchy Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
1 large Egg yolks plus 2 tsp water
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Cream together butter and brown sugar in a bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in egg yolk mixture or egg white.
4. Add flour, baking powder, salt, and vanilla; stir until dough is well blended.
5. Stir in chocolate chips and rice cereal.
6. Shape the dough into level tablespoons, spacing them 2 inches apart on a lightly greased baking sheet.
7. Bake in the center of the oven for 8-10 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Transfer cookies to a rack with a spatula and let cool.
